name: Is Love Reality Full of Lies?
original_name: 恋リアなんて嘘だらけ？
overview: Yuna, a shy college freshman who dreams of becoming an influencer, joins a seaside love reality show by chance. But behind the glitz, most contestants are chasing fame—not love—and the show's director will do anything for views. In a world full of lies, can Yuna find something real?

trailers.title: 憧れの恋リアに参加するが、全てヤラセでした... #bumpドラマ #恋リアなんて嘘だらけ #恋愛リアリティーショー
